No assessment Iran could strike London, UK minister saysSteve Reed says there is "no specific assessment" Iran is capable of hitting the UK, after Israel claimed it now could. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crm120x4lzxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crm120x4lzxo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 15:22:39 GMT
Energy bills rise 'inescapable' if oil prices stay high, says British Gas bossThe boss of Centrica says it is "too early" to speculate but if oil costs continue to rise, homes will be hit. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c77mx575k4vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c77mx575k4vo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 12:52:56 GMT

'We cannot be in peace', say Guthrie family as they renew appeal over missing motherA seven-week nationwide search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has not identified any suspects. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0q9zx4g1w9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0q9zx4g1w9o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 14:45:34 GMT
